ModMetaData.name: Smart Genes
ModMetaData.author: Axolotl
ModMetaData.description: A mod that allows genes to dynamically generate for every trait present in your game. Ever wanted your hyperactive xenotypes to always be trigger happy? Now you can do that and more in one mod. This is an attempt at making a mod that gives the player more control over xenotypes and genes. It automatically generates genes to force every trait, modded or unmodded, that you would see in the game. Genes may take awhile to load, and I would reccomend collapsing the tab in the editor, cause there are a lot of traits. *ONLY TESTED IN 1.5 and 1.6*
